summary: Selects a specific image stream (color, depth, confidence, normals, etc.) from an upstream ZED TOP. Part of the new ZED workflow where a single ZED TOP exposes the camera and downstream Select TOPs pick which stream to consume.

key_params.name: zedtop
key_params.note: Path to the upstream ZED TOP

key_params.name: stream
key_params.note: Color, Depth, Normals, Confidence, Disparity, etc.

key_params.name: view
key_params.note: Left, Right, or Side-by-Side for stereo cameras

common_gotchas: Migration: ZED operators in older builds were standalone. In 2025.30000+ they all go through the ZED TOP — Select TOP replaces the per-stream operators.
Requires ZED SDK 5.0.2+ and a Blackwell-capable GPU for the latest features.
